SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 Notification

java.lang.Object
com.example.syntaxappproject.Notification
public class Notification extends Object
Model class representing a notification sent by an organizer or admin to a group of event entrants in the SyntaxEvents application.

Notifications are written to two locations in Firestore:

  • A canonical record in the top-level notifications collection, used by admins to audit all sent notifications.
  • A personal copy in each recipient's users/{userId}/notifications subcollection, used to populate the user's notification inbox.

The senderRole field determines which opt-out preference is checked before delivery: "ORGANIZER" checks organizerNotificationEnabled, and "ADMIN" checks adminNotificationEnabled in the user's profile.

Admin notifications use eventId = "ADMINISTRATION" to indicate they are platform-level messages not tied to any specific event.

另请参阅:
  • NotificationRepository

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Notification()
    Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    修饰符和类型

    说明
    String
    getBody()
    Returns the full message body of the notification.
    String
    getEventId()
    Returns the event ID associated with this notification.
    String
    getEventName()
    Returns the display name of the event, resolved at read time.
    String
    getNotificationId()
    Returns the unique identifier for this notification.
    String
    getSenderId()
    Returns the UID of the user who sent this notification.
    String
    getSenderRole()
    Returns the role of the sender.
    String
    getStatus()
    Returns the delivery status of this notification.
    List<String>
    getTargetEntrantIds()
    Returns the list of specific entrant IDs targeted by this notification.
    String
    getTargetGroup()
    Returns the target group for this notification.
    long
    getTimestamp()
    Returns the Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the notification was sent.
    String
    getTitle()
    Returns the short title of the notification.

    Sets the full message body of the notification.
    void

    Sets the event ID associated with this notification.

    Sets the display name of the event for rendering purposes.
    void

    Sets the unique identifier for this notification.

    Sets the UID of the user who sent this notification.

    Sets the role of the sender.
    void

    Sets the delivery status of this notification.

    Sets the list of specific entrant IDs targeted by this notification.
    void
    setTargetGroup(String targetGroup)
    Sets the target group for this notification.
    void
    setTimestamp(long timestamp)
    Sets the Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the notification was sent.
    void
    setTitle(String title)
    Sets the short title of the notification.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Notification

      public Notification()
      Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.

  • 方法详细资料

    • getNotificationId

      public String getNotificationId()
      Returns the unique identifier for this notification.
      返回:
      the notification ID, or null if not yet persisted

    • setNotificationId

      public void setNotificationId(String notificationId)
      Sets the unique identifier for this notification.
      参数:
      notificationId - the Firestore document ID

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns the event ID associated with this notification.
      返回:
      the event ID, or "ADMINISTRATION" for admin notifications

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Sets the event ID associated with this notification.
      参数:
      eventId - the Firestore document ID of the event

    • getSenderId

      public String getSenderId()
      Returns the UID of the user who sent this notification.
      返回:
      the sender's user ID

    • setSenderId

      public void setSenderId(String senderId)
      Sets the UID of the user who sent this notification.
      参数:
      senderId - the sender's user ID

    • getSenderRole

      public String getSenderRole()
      Returns the role of the sender.
      返回:
      "ORGANIZER" or "ADMIN"

    • setSenderRole

      public void setSenderRole(String senderRole)
      Sets the role of the sender.
      参数:
      senderRole - "ORGANIZER" or "ADMIN"

    • getEventName

      public String getEventName()
      Returns the display name of the event, resolved at read time.
      返回:
      the event name, or null if not yet resolved

    • setEventName

      public void setEventName(String eventName)
      Sets the display name of the event for rendering purposes.
      参数:
      eventName - the human-readable event name

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the short title of the notification.
      返回:
      the notification title

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Sets the short title of the notification.
      参数:
      title - the notification title

    • getBody

      public String getBody()
      Returns the full message body of the notification.
      返回:
      the notification body

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)
      Sets the full message body of the notification.
      参数:
      body - the notification body

    • getTimestamp

      public long getTimestamp()
      Returns the Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the notification was sent.
      返回:
      the timestamp in milliseconds

    • setTimestamp

      public void setTimestamp(long timestamp)
      Sets the Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the notification was sent.
      参数:
      timestamp - the timestamp in milliseconds

    • getTargetGroup

      public String getTargetGroup()
      Returns the target group for this notification.
      返回:
      one of "ALL", "WAITLIST", "SELECTED", "CANCELLED"

    • setTargetGroup

      public void setTargetGroup(String targetGroup)
      Sets the target group for this notification.
      参数:
      targetGroup - one of "ALL", "WAITLIST", "SELECTED", "CANCELLED"

    • getTargetEntrantIds

      public List<String> getTargetEntrantIds()
      Returns the list of specific entrant IDs targeted by this notification.
      返回:
      list of user IDs, or null if not applicable

    • setTargetEntrantIds

      public void setTargetEntrantIds(List<String> targetEntrantIds)
      Sets the list of specific entrant IDs targeted by this notification.
      参数:
      targetEntrantIds - list of user IDs

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the delivery status of this notification.
      返回:
      one of "SENT", "FAILED", "PENDING"

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the delivery status of this notification.
      参数:
      status - one of "SENT", "FAILED", "PENDING"
